title: clinopodium fasciculatum
intro: Clinopodium fasciculatum, also known as fascicled clinopodium, is a perennial herb in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the western United States and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Clinopodium fasciculatum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
